Our Services

Our Landscaping Services

Specialising in porcelain patios, composite decking, and glass balustrades, we bring years of experience and a commitment to excellence to every project across HP6, HP7 and surrounding areas.

Elegant & Low-Maintenance Outdoor Living

Porcelain Patios

Transform your garden with stunning porcelain patio installations in Amersham and Buckinghamshire. Our premium porcelain paving offers timeless beauty with minimal maintenance requirements.

  • Frost & slip-resistant surfaces
  • Stain and scratch-proof
  • Wide range of styles & colours
  • 10+ year lifespan
Enquire About Porcelain Patios
Durable & Beautiful Outdoor Spaces

Composite Decking

Elevate your outdoor living with premium composite decking solutions. Perfect for Amersham gardens, our decking combines natural wood aesthetics with modern durability.

  • No sanding or staining required
  • Weather-resistant materials
  • Anti-slip surface
  • Eco-friendly recycled materials
Enquire About Composite Decking
Modern Safety with Uninterrupted Views

Glass Balustrades

Enhance your property with custom glass balustrade installations. From balconies to staircases, our glass solutions provide safety without compromising on style or views.

  • Toughened safety glass
  • Frameless & framed options
  • BS building regulations compliant
  • Unobstructed views
Enquire About Glass Balustrades
Complete Outdoor Transformations

Garden Landscaping

Full-service garden landscaping across Buckinghamshire. From design to completion, we create beautiful outdoor spaces tailored to your lifestyle and preferences.

  • Bespoke garden design
  • Hard & soft landscaping
  • Garden lighting
  • Water features
Enquire About Garden Landscaping

Not sure which service is right for your project?

Get Free Expert Advice

Recent Projects in Buckinghamshire

Browse our portfolio of completed porcelain patios, composite decking, and glass balustrade installations.

Porcelain Patio

Modern Porcelain Patio - Hemel Hempstead

Hemel Hempstead, HP3
July 202490m²

A stunning 90m² modern porcelain patio installation featuring Kandla grey tiles with elegant two-tone border detailing. The project included professionally recessed manholes and seamless integration with bi-fold doors.

View Modern Porcelain Patio - Hemel Hempstead details
Full Landscaping

Egyptian Limestone Patio

Beaconsfield, HP9
December 2025120m²

A total garden refurbishment featuring Egyptian limestone paving with herringbone detailed work, new turf area, water feature and front drive transformation.

View Egyptian Limestone Patio details
Porcelain Patio

Raised Porcelain Patio with Lighting

Amersham
Feb 2023110m²

A new raised porcelain patio with lighting around the perimeter, creating a stunning outdoor entertaining space for evening use.

View Raised Porcelain Patio with Lighting details
View All Projects
About Us

Your Trusted Local Landscaping Experts in Amersham

At Oliver Charles Garden Design & Build, we take pride in being a family-run business with a genuine passion for transforming outdoor spaces across Amersham, Chesham, and the wider Buckinghamshire area.

Specialising in porcelain patios, composite decking, and glass balustrades, we bring a personal touch to every project. With over 10 years of experience serving homeowners in the HP6 and HP7 postcode areas.

Learn More About Us
Why Choose Us

The Oliver Charles Difference

When you choose Oliver Charles Garden Design & Build, you're not just getting a landscaping service – you're partnering with a dedicated team that truly cares about your outdoor space.

5-Year Guarantee

Every installation comes with our comprehensive 5-year workmanship guarantee, giving you complete peace of mind.

On-Time Completion

We respect your time. Our projects are completed efficiently without compromising on quality.

Eco-Friendly Materials

We prioritise sustainable, environmentally responsible materials wherever possible.

Premium Quality

Only the finest materials from trusted UK suppliers make it into our projects.

Expert Craftsmanship

Our skilled team brings years of experience and attention to detail to every project.

Local Knowledge

Based in Amersham, we understand local properties, weather conditions, and planning requirements.

Fully Insured

Public liability coverage

Free Quotes

No obligation estimates

Local Business

Amersham based team

5★ Rated

Customer satisfaction
